overview: Prime HRT & Weight Loss provides hormone replacement therapy, weight loss programs, peptides, and IV infusion services through a functional medicine approach with personalized treatment plans and dedicated health coaches.
highlights: Telehealth, in-person, and mobile service options
Dedicated health coach assigned to each patient
InBody 580 scanner for body composition tracking
targetAudience: Men and women seeking personalized hormone replacement and weight loss care, including athletes.
